rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM M NEWELL et al VS. CLEAVER-BROOKS INC INDIVIDUALLY AND F/K/A et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 14, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED ON CLAIMS FOR NEGLIGENCE, STRICT LIABILITY AND LOSS OF CONSORTIUM. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED ON THE CLAIM FOR FALSE MISREPRESENTATION, INTENTIONAL TORT, BREACH OF WARRANTY AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES BECAUSE OF A LACK OF TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: PERCY RAMOS VS. CALIFORNIA PARKING COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 14, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, ZAVALA V SCOTT BROTHERS DAIRY (2006) 143 CAL. APP. 4TH 585, 596. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION; PAYMENT UNDER LABOR CODE SECTION 226.7 IS A PENALTY, NOT RESTITUTION. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON LABOR CODE SECTION 2699.3. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Tax Costs

rulings.Case Title: AMMEL PARK VS. MICHAEL MULLEN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 14, 2007, LINE 11. DEFENDANT MICHAEL MULLEN'S DEMURRER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE OPPOSITION WAS UNTIMELY AND IT FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT THE NOTICE REQUIREMENTS OF THE RENT ORDINANCE HAVE BEEN MET. THE NOTICE TO TERMINATE MUST STATE THE REASON UNDER THE ORDINANCE. THE NOTICE GIVEN ONLY DESCRIBED THE DEFENDANT'S TENANCY. =(302/PJM)
